author: macfarla
content: Agree it would be nice for the error messages to be ignored. This is one attempt at ignoring the error messages in hive test result comparisons - where error messages are nested within the result json https://github.com/ethereum/hive/pull/1399

author: s1na
content: btw on the order of operations: one idea is for test cases to come with a set of acceptable error codes. As a way of saying the following tx has invalid gas price, too low nonce and insufficient balance. The test should pass on each of those error codes
